A NEW ERA OF ROBOT COMBAT
BattleBots launches Pro League powered by Bright Data

24 of the best robots in the world go head-to-head in this brand new competition format, where every fight is crucial and only the top teams in the league battle through to the final knockout rounds. There are shocks and upsets in every episode as teams from the United States, New Zealand, Australia, Canada, Brazil, UK and India converge on Las Vegas for the world’s ultimate robot combat challenge. 

You can watch the entire explosive 20-part season exclusively on the BattleBots YouTube Channel.  Episodes will stream weekly from Thursday July 2nd, available across the globe. Join millions of fans in the sport’s worldwide community – subscribe to the BattleBots Channel now to make sure you don’t miss a single episode. 

The series is sponsored by BattleBots’ Ultimate Sponsor Bright Data
